heading: Applications
label: 3903 Applications
notes: Amendments2016—Subsec. (b). substituted “paragraph (9) or (10)” for “paragraph (8) or (9)”.Pub. L. 114–322
“Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 113–121section 2201 of this title
amendments: Amendments2016—Subsec. (b). substituted “paragraph (9) or (10)” for “paragraph (8) or (9)”.Pub. L. 114–322

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: To receive assistance under this chapter, an eligible entity shall submit to the Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, an application at such time, in such manner, and containing such information as the Secretary or the Administrator may require.

children.heading: Combined projects
children.label: b Combined projects
children.text: In the case of an eligible project described in paragraph (9) or (10) of , the Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, shall require the eligible entity to submit a single application for the combined group of projects.section 3905 of this title
